who amasses wealth and counts it over and again.Footnote-2
He thinks that his wealth will immortalise him forever.Footnote-3
Nay, he shall be thrownFootnote-4 into the Crusher.Footnote-5
And what do you know what the Crusher is?
It is the FireFootnote-6 kindled by Allah,
the Fire that shall rise to the hearts (of criminals).Footnote-7
Verily it will close in upon them,Footnote-8
